nasb.text: He delivers and rescues and performs signs and wonders In heaven and on earth, Who has also delivered Daniel from the power of the lions.”

esv.text: He delivers and rescues; he works signs and wonders in heaven and on earth, he who has saved Daniel from the power of the lions.”

cnv.text: 他搭救人，拯救人； 他在天上地下施行神蹟奇事； 他搭救了但以理脫離獅子的爪。”

ccb.text: 祂庇护、拯救， 在天上地下行神迹奇事， 救但以理脱离狮子的口。”
